gates.name: Local runtime lifecycle
gates.evidence: questionnaire, description, raw chat creation paths are exercised; chat, state persistence, memory/state inspection, and sleep trigger are available in-process.

gates.name: Persona conditioning causality
gates.evidence: curious and guarded profiles produce different action distributions under identical messages.

gates.name: Stress and failure injection
gates.evidence: long input, no-agent controlled failure, safety blocking, precision anomaly, and persistence-after-stress checks pass.

gates.name: REST/WebSocket API
gates.evidence: Owner removed this from the current M5.6 acceptance scope on 2026-04-30.

gates.name: Scenario endpoint
gates.evidence: Owner removed POST /persona/{id}/scenario from the current M5.6 acceptance scope on 2026-04-30.
